zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pruet於1640年出生在英國英格蘭素可易亞斯特 古爾德福德。她和Thomas Sands至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1730年在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾沙爾肯多福享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pruet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pruitt
meanings: English (Lanarkshire, Scotland): variant of   Prewitt  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

historicEvents.title: French Monarchy
historicEvents.description: The French monarchy started way before the 1700s, but for the most part the major events of history took place during this time before the French Revolution started. This was known as the Bourbon Dynasty. Louis XIV the Great, Louis XV the Beloved, Louis XVI the Restorer of French Liberty, and Louis XVII all reigned during this time.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pruet was born in 1640, in East Guldeford, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Thomas Sands. She died in 1730, in Schalkendorf, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, at the age of 90.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pruetは1640年にイギリスイギリススセックスエアスト グルデフォードで生まれた。彼女はThomas Sandsとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1730年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンスチャルケンドルフで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pruet(은)는 1640년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 이스트 구데퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Sands(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1730년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 샤켄도르프에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pruet родилась в 1640 г. в местности эаст гулдефорд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Thomas Sands. Она умерла в 1730 г. в местности щэлкендорф, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция в возрасте 90 лет.
